notebook_path.description: The absolute path to the .ipynb file to edit

new_source.description: The new source for the cell. Required for replace and insert; ignored for delete.

cell_id.description: The id of the cell to edit. If omitted with cell_number, falls back to index lookup.

cell_number.description: 0-indexed cell position. Used when cell_id is not provided.

cell_type.description: Cell type. Required when inserting; for replace, changing the type clears outputs and execution_count.

edit_mode.description: What to do at the located cell. Defaults to replace.

clear_outputs.description: When replacing a code cell, wipe its outputs and execution_count. Default false.
